info.title: DotLens
info.description: MCP server for .NET/C# semantic code analysis using Roslyn.

options.name: --InstructionLevel
options.description: Detailed   Server instructions level (None, Brief, Detailed)

options.name: --LogLevel
options.description: Warning    Log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error)

options.name: --SolutionPath
options.description: (none)     Solution path (.sln/.slnx file) or directory to search

options.name: --AutoLoadSolution
options.description: true       Auto-detect and load solution from working directory

options.name: --UseAbsolutePaths
options.description: false      Use absolute paths instead of solution-relative

options.name: --LoadWaitTimeoutSeconds
options.description: 5          Seconds to wait for in-progress load before returning 'loading' status (1-60)

options.name: --MaxLoadTimeoutSeconds
options.description: 300        Max seconds for solution load before timeout (30-1800)

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version and exit
--worker     Run in worker mode (internal)
